mustache-error-no-template: Error message shown when {{#mustache:}} is used without specifying a template name.
mustache-error-invalid-template:
Error message shown when an invalid template name is provided to {{#mustache:}}.

Parameters:
* $1 - the invalid template name
mustache-error-template-not-found:
Error message shown when a specified Mustache template does not exist.

Parameters: $1 - the template name that was not found
mustache-error-raw-interpolation: Error message shown when a Mustache template uses raw interpolation {{{ or {{& or Set Delimiter tag {{=.
mustache-error-script-interpolation: Error message shown when a Mustache template contains Mustache syntax inside <script> tags.
mustache-error-style-interpolation: Error message shown when a Mustache template contains Mustache syntax inside <style> tags.
mustache-error-dangerous-attribute:
Error message shown when a Mustache template contains interpolation in dangerous attributes.

Parameters: $1 - the attribute name; $2 - the tag name
mustache-error-attribute-name-interpolat:
Error message shown when a Mustache template contains interpolation in attribute names.

Parameters: $1 - the tag name
mustache-error-render-failed:
Error message shown when Mustache template rendering fails due to an engine error.

Parameters:
* $1 - the error message from the Mustache engine
